calculus_and_linear_algebra_view.active_subspace: low-rank eigenspaces of empirical response identify high-benefit coordinates under byte constraints
calculus_and_linear_algebra_view.differential: dS = grad_seg dM + grad_pose dP + lambda_rate d|A|
calculus_and_linear_algebra_view.hessian: H approximates pair/frame/class/stream interactions and non-additive scorer curvature
calculus_and_linear_algebra_view.projection: Dykstra/ADMM-style projections enforce rate, runtime, compliance, and reproducibility constraints
series_expansions: Taylor/Frechet expansions for local scorer response
Fourier/DCT/Walsh expansions for mask and residual fields
Neumann-style iterative correction when operators are contractive inside a trust region

constraints: all score-affecting bits are charged inside archive.zip or fixed contest code
inflate is deterministic and finishes inside contest budget on T4/equivalent
no scorer patching, sidecars, network fetches, or host-local score bits
score claims require exact CUDA auth eval on exact archive bytes
Apogee-owned native codecs and parsers prefer Rust over C++ unless public replay custody requires existing source
field_bases: entropy-code symbols and packer layout bits

measure_theoretic_view.empirical_measure: uniform measure over the 600 official pair samples
measure_theoretic_view.posenet_measure: mu_pose(pair, dim)=squared pose-coordinate error before outer sqrt
measure_theoretic_view.segnet_measure: mu_seg(pair, pixel, class)=argmax-disagreement contribution after scorer preprocessing

number_theoretic_and_coding_view.canonicalization: member order, timestamps, permissions, and codec parameters are part of the integer byte solution
number_theoretic_and_coding_view.integer_lattice: archive bytes, quantized symbols, row runs, pose deltas, and entropy-code states live on integer lattices
number_theoretic_and_coding_view.modular_constraints: fixed-width and fixed-length PR85 fields impose congruence/length constraints before any shrink is valid
number_theoretic_and_coding_view.prefix_codes: variable-length and arithmetic-coded streams must be uniquely decodable under the charged runtime grammar

set_theoretic_view.archive_space: A = {byte strings accepted by strict zip/archive validator}
set_theoretic_view.feasible_set: F = A intersect C_compliance intersect C_runtime intersect C_reproducibility
set_theoretic_view.field_space: Phi = M x P x Theta x Z x H x G
set_theoretic_view.promotion_set: P++ = F intersect {exact CUDA T4/equivalent evidence, 600 samples, clean custody}
set_theoretic_view.runtime_space: D = {deterministic inflate programs closed over archive bytes and fixed contest code}
set_theoretic_view.stackability: two transforms compose only when their read/write coordinate sets are disjoint or an exact stacked archive proves compatibility

signal_theoretic_view.actionable_use: choose low-dimensional proposal bases and anti-aliasing guards before exact CUDA archive tests
risks: aliasing or phase errors can be visually small but PoseNet-catastrophic
argmax semantic cliffs make smooth proxy losses non-promotable
generic entropy wins can be no-ops unless decoded signal identity or exact component deltas are recorded
signal_theoretic_view.scorer_channels: SegNet observes second-frame semantic content; PoseNet observes two-frame motion/geometry

planning_constraints: This manifest is planning-only and cannot rank or promote by itself.
Structured exact CUDA artifacts override all static and external fields.
Any future dispatch still requires an active lane claim.

fields.name: mask
fields.optimization_role: dominant rate and SegNet/PoseNet geometry coordinate

schema_facts.static_parse_limit: tensor table depends on JointFrameGenerator module order in replay runtime

fields.name: randmulti
fields.optimization_role: largest explicit correction table and water-fill target

fields.name: tokens.bin
fields.optimization_role: dominant PR86 rate field and HPAC transfer target

stacking_rules.example: rate-only packer change plus unchanged decoded PR85 fields
stacking_rules.required_evidence: exact stacked archive before score claim

stacking_rules.example: two mask repair policies both editing QMA9-derived semantic geometry
stacking_rules.required_evidence: typed reconciliation manifest plus exact CUDA eval

stacking_rules.example: PR85 replay runtime with range_mask_codec.cpp included in hash
stacking_rules.required_evidence: runtime custody manifest and explicit comparison class

stacking_rules.example: entropy profile can rank atoms but cannot promote them
stacking_rules.required_evidence: exact CUDA auth eval on exact archive bytes
